claim_boundary.next_gate: Publicly preregister calibration-aware physical-qubit selection, routing/readout ablations, and disjoint readout mitigation before collecting a new holdout.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: A mitigation win, causal noise decomposition, current calibration, provider access, hardware execution, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Row-level attribution of the fixed R125 historical-snapshot failure across readout, routing, task, bundle, and seed-block strata.

mitigation_queue.rationale: Select the six physical qubits and initial layout using only frozen snapshot properties before evaluation.
Separate topology/routing exposure from measurement exposure on new disjoint seeds.
Fit any confusion-matrix correction only on calibration rows excluded from evaluation.
Replace frozen snapshots with current provider-backed properties or independent raw-count transcripts.

requirements.label: the complete R125 result is hash-bound and consumed
all six snapshot/task combinations have attribution rows
all representative QASM 3 circuits parse and preserve measurement order
all historical snapshot hashes remain bound
bundle-choice strata cover every source trial
seed-block strata cover every source trial
readout and CX exposure proxies are finite and bounded
small-sample correlations are explicitly descriptive only
mitigation packets are proposed without reusing holdout for acceptance
no hardware, soundness, advantage, BQP, or new credit is claimed
